name: hugin-jobs
description: Periodically fetches job listings per poster via code sources and uses an LLM to match them to a described position, notifying Telegram subscribers.

scripts.dry-run:sources:google: HUGIN_PORTAL=google HUGIN_DRY_RUN=1 HUGIN_DRY_RUN_SKIP_LLM=1 HUGIN_RUN_ONCE=1 tsx src/index.ts
scripts.dry-run:sources:qualcomm: HUGIN_PORTAL=qualcomm HUGIN_DRY_RUN=1 HUGIN_DRY_RUN_SKIP_LLM=1 HUGIN_RUN_ONCE=1 tsx src/index.ts
scripts.dry-run:sources:apple: HUGIN_PORTAL=apple HUGIN_DRY_RUN=1 HUGIN_DRY_RUN_SKIP_LLM=1 HUGIN_RUN_ONCE=1 tsx src/index.ts
scripts.dry-run:sources:databricks: HUGIN_PORTAL=databricks HUGIN_DRY_RUN=1 HUGIN_DRY_RUN_SKIP_LLM=1 HUGIN_RUN_ONCE=1 tsx src/index.ts
scripts.dry-run:sources:nvidia: HUGIN_PORTAL=nvidia HUGIN_DRY_RUN=1 HUGIN_DRY_RUN_SKIP_LLM=1 HUGIN_RUN_ONCE=1 tsx src/index.ts
